calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2005 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-05-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-05-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-16-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as a reassignment from the Master Calendar for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Sidney Sheray, Esq. for Plaintiff: Speck Cab Company dba Arrow Cab Company, represented by
Tyler Speck.
Angel Baker, Esq. and Nancy Sullivan Walter, Esq. for Defendant: Stuart Montgomery, also present.
11:00 A.M., Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Settlement in the amount of $3,000.00, payment to be made within 10 days.
Each side to bear own costs and fees, and waived claims against each other.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled by the Court and placed on the CRC-225 calendar of Aug. 16, 2005 at 10 a.m. for DISMISSAL.
